expo.name: My Favor
expo.description: My Favor is a two-sided marketplace to request everyday favors and errands, or earn money completing favors as a Favor Pal.

infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: My Favor needs access to your photos so you can add an image to a favor request or set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: My Favor needs access to your camera so you can take a photo for a favor request or your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: My Favor uses your location while you're completing a favor so the member can see how far away their Favor Pal is.

plugins.photosPermission: My Favor needs access to your photos so you can add an image to a favor request or set your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: My Favor needs access to your camera so you can take a photo for a favor request or your profile picture.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: My Favor uses your location while you're completing a favor so the member can see how far away their Favor Pal is.
